overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a coastal landscape, transitioning from a grassy field near a rocky cliff, through a dense bamboo forest, and up an open hillside toward a wooden shrine gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy coastal meadow with rocky cliff backdrop

events.description: location text 'ISONADE COAST' appears in the lower right corner
character approaches the entrance to the bamboo forest path

agents.ego_description: samurai walking through tall grass toward the forest path entrance

notable_agents.action: group of hostile figures standing near the rocky cliff face

entered.detail: large gray rock formation rising behind the grassy field
dense green grass covering the ground
primitive wooden frame structure near the path entrance
dense cluster of tall bamboo marking the trail ahead

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a grassy coastal meadow with a large rocky cliff rising in the background. Hostile figures are visible in the distance near the cliff. The character approaches a narrow path leading into a dense bamboo forest, with wooden scaffolding visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow winding path through dense bamboo forest

events.description: entering the dense bamboo forest from open grassland
path becomes darker as the bamboo canopy thickens overhead

agents.ego_description: samurai walking steadily along the winding dirt path surrounded by tall bamboo

entered.detail: narrow winding trail covered with fallen bamboo leaves

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dense bamboo forest where the path becomes enclosed by tall green bamboo stalks on both sides. The lighting dims as the canopy thickens overhead. The samurai continues walking along the narrow dirt trail winding through the forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside path with scattered pine trees

events.description: exiting the bamboo forest into open hillside terrain
wooden torii gate becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: samurai ascending the hillside path away from the bamboo forest

entered.detail: tall pine trees dotting the grassy hillside
sloped terrain covered in green grass
traditional Japanese gate structure marking the shrine entrance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the bamboo forest onto an open hillside with scattered pine trees. The path widens as it ascends the grassy slope. A traditional wooden torii gate becomes visible in the distance, marking the approach to a shrine.

events.description: character approaches closer to the torii gate structure

agents.ego_description: samurai approaching the wooden torii gate at the path's end

notable_agents.action: figures standing near the torii gate ahead

entered.detail: structural wooden posts supporting the torii gate

segments.scene_description: The samurai approaches the wooden torii gate, which now dominates the center of the frame. The surrounding grassy hills and pine trees fall away as the path leads directly to the shrine entrance. Figures can be seen standing near the gate structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide coastal meadow into a secluded bamboo grove before ascending toward a traditional hillside shrine. It begins with the samurai traversing a grassy field beneath a towering rocky cliff where hostile figures linger in the distance, moving steadily toward a narrow path flanked by wooden scaffolding. As the character enters the bamboo forest, the environment closes in with tall green stalks and the lighting dims under a thickening canopy. The scene then opens up as the samurai emerges from the woods onto a widening dirt trail that climbs a grassy slope dotted with pine trees. Finally, the camera tracks the ascent toward a wooden torii gate that dominates the frame, leading the way to figures waiting at the shrine entrance.
